title: Will the film 'Barbie' (2023, Greta Gerwig) exceed $1.0 billion in global box office by August 31, 2023?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Box Office Mojo or The Numbers reports cumulative worldwide gross >= $1,000,000,000 USD on or before 2023-08-31. Otherwise NO.
context_hint: Tracking poll for an upcoming Warner Bros. release directed by Greta Gerwig and starring Margot Robbie. Pre-release tracking projections released June 2023 estimated $90-120M opening weekend in North America. Theatrical release date is July 21, 2023.
notes_for_evaluation: Market resolved YES on August 6, 2023 when Barbie passed the $1B mark globally. Final gross exceeded $1.4B.
